title: Flutter Application Resource Bundle (.arb)
description: De-facto schema for ARB files as produced/consumed by Flutter gen_l10n and the ARB specification. An ARB document is a flat JSON object. Each property is one of: a message (key -> ICU MessageFormat string value), an attribute object ("@<id>" -> { description, placeholders, ... }), or a global ("@@<name>", e.g. "@@locale", "@@last_modified"). The schema enforces that message values are strings and attribute/global keys carry the documented shapes, without constraining the open-ended set of message keys.

^@@[A-Za-z0-9_]+$.description: Global resource attribute, e.g. @@locale or @@last_modified. Any JSON value.

^[^@].*$.description: A message: its value is an ICU MessageFormat string.

attributes.description: Resource attributes for the message with the same name minus the leading '@'.
